title: paronychia rugelii var. interior
intro: Paronychia rugelii var. interior, also known as Interior Paronychia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Nyctaginaceae family, characterized by its small white flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Interior Paronychia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from minor skin issues such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can be dried and used as a topical application or added to salves and creams for maximum benefit.
